project_type: Full-stack AI video generation app - React frontend + FastAPI backend
build_system: Vite + npm (frontend), setuptools + pip (backend), Docker Compose for production
test_command: cd /projects/sandbox/abetVideos/frontend && npm test && cd /projects/sandbox/abetVideos/backend && python -m pytest tests/ -v
verification_instructions: 1. Run frontend build (tsc + vite build). 2. Run frontend tests (vitest). 3. Run backend tests (pytest). 4. Verify lazy loading by checking that the editor chunk is separate in vite build output.
setup_instructions: cd frontend && npm install; cd backend && pip install -e '.[dev]'
environment_constraints: OPEN_INTERNET - full network access. Node 22, Python 3.11. FFmpeg available.
contribution_requirements: Conventional commits (feat:, fix:, docs:). Feature branches.

key_patterns.routing: React Router v7 in src/App.tsx with BrowserRouter, Routes, Route. Layout wraps all routes via Outlet.
key_patterns.api_client: Axios-based client in src/api/client.ts with /api base. Vite proxies /api to localhost:8000.
key_patterns.components: Flat component structure in src/components/. Pages in src/pages/.
key_patterns.backend_routers: FastAPI routers in app/routers/ with /api prefix. Schemas in app/models/schemas.py.
key_patterns.backend_services: Service modules in app/services/ for video_assembler, tts_service, media_sourcer, etc.
key_patterns.styling: Tailwind CSS v4 via @tailwindcss/vite plugin. Dark theme with gray-800/900 backgrounds.

directory_structure: Root: backend/ (FastAPI app), frontend/ (React+Vite), docker-compose.yml. Frontend: src/pages/, src/components/, src/api/, src/hooks/, src/types/. Backend: app/routers/, app/services/, app/models/, tests/.
